parameters.name: multiOmicDataSet file pattern
parameters.description: Regex pattern used to locate the multiOmicDataSet .rds file

parameters.name: Feature ID column name
parameters.description: Column name for feature IDs

parameters.name: Significance column
parameters.description: Column name for significance (e.g., pval or adjpval)

parameters.name: Significance cutoff
parameters.description: Features must be below this significance cutoff

parameters.name: Change column
parameters.description: Column name for change (e.g., logFC)

parameters.name: Change cutoff
parameters.description: Absolute change threshold

parameters.name: Filtering mode
parameters.description: Include features meeting criteria in any or all contrasts (any/all)

parameters.name: Include estimates
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of estimates to include

parameters.name: Round estimates
parameters.description: Whether to round estimates

parameters.name: Contrast filter
parameters.description: Whether to keep, remove, or ignore contrast filtering

parameters.name: Contrasts
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of contrasts to keep/remove

parameters.name: Groups
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of groups to keep/remove

parameters.name: Groups filter
parameters.description: Whether to keep, remove, or ignore group filtering

parameters.name: Rounding decimals for percent
parameters.description: Decimal places for percent labels

parameters.name: Label font size
parameters.description: Font size for labels in plots

parameters.name: Label distance
parameters.description: Distance of labels from bars

parameters.name: Y-axis expansion
parameters.description: Expansion of the y-axis

parameters.name: Fill colors
parameters.description: Comma-separated fill colors for bars

parameters.name: Pie chart in 3D
parameters.description: Whether to draw pie charts in 3D

parameters.name: Bar width
parameters.description: Width of bars

parameters.name: Draw bar border
parameters.description: Whether to draw borders around bars

parameters.name: Plot type
parameters.description: Plot type: bar or pie

parameters.name: Plot titles fontsize
parameters.description: Font size for plot titles
